content.en:
The primordial stone is a kind of stone-like primordial antiquity, which is not large, only one meter in diameter, and the color is gray.

However, this Primordial Ancient Stone was very powerful, and the weaker ones were comparable to the Dao Ancestors of the peak level of the Sixfold Primordial Ancestors, and the powerful ones were even more comparable to the Half-Step Sevenfold Primordial Ancestors.

What's more, there are a lot of these primordial stones!

In this area, dense primordial ancient stones are suspended here, intercepting a lot of time and space, and if you want to pass through here, you can only forcibly fight through it.

"Fellow Dao Ancestors, don't save the Primordial Ancient Bead, use it at a critical moment, otherwise it will fall if you are not careful. Moreover, fighting with these Primordial Ancient Stones, once it is delayed for a while, it may even attract other Primordial Artifacts nearby, and it will be very big soon!" Qingfeng Daozu reminded.

Many Dao Ancestors nodded slightly, indicating that they were clear.

Thundered!!!!

The battle is on!

The dense Primordial Ancient Stones attacked these half-step Sevenfold Ancestors, and Ye Tian was naturally also attacked.

These Primordial Ancient Stones were not as difficult to kill as the Primordial Ancients, but there were too many of them, so in an instant, many half-step Sevenfold Primordial Ancestors were crushed.

In the blink of an eye, a half-step sevenfold ancestor was shattered, but the power of the Primordial Ancient Bead allowed these half-step sevenfold ancestors to recover quickly.

"Don't fall in love with the war, send Qingfeng Daozu and them out of this area, even if you have completed the task!"

Xuanqing Dao Ancestor and other half-step sevenfold ancestors said.

It is almost impossible to kill all these primordial ancient stones, and it is almost impossible to kill them all these primordial ancient stones.

Therefore, they only thought about sending Qingfeng Dao Ancestor away quickly, and they could leave.

Although Ye Tian's strength was not weak, he was soon injured, after all, too many primordial ancient stones were besieging him!

In desperation, he could only use the Primordial Ancient Bead to restore his body and sign up.

Otherwise, if this body falls, not only will the Golden Branch Void Fruit in his hand be lost, but there will be no way to explain the fact that he is still alive in the future.

So, he has to save his life as much as possible!

As time passed, many Dao Ancestors continued to advance under the protection of Qingfeng Dao Ancestors, and finally passed through the territory of the original ancient stone.

"Dao Ancestors, see you soon!"

Qingfeng Dao Ancestor and the other seven Dao Ancestors turned into seven rays of light and left through the void.

The other Dao Ancestors did not have time to see the Qingfeng Dao Ancestors, but immediately returned, and it took a while to finally kill the Truncated Black Mountain and return to the Silent Black Sea.

"It's finally out, we have to return to the nearest district boundary immediately!"

A Dao Ancestor secretly said.

Immediately, many half-step sevenfold ancestors shuttled quickly, but they still encountered a lot of primordial ancients along the way, many of which were comparable to the half-step sevenfold primordial ancestors.

And Ye Tian also suffered such an attack, but he still insisted on reaching the nearest district boundary, but he also spent a lot of Primordial Ancient Beads.

"Fortunately, there is the Primordial Ancient Bead, otherwise this replica body wouldn't be able to hold on at all!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

This time, he assisted Qingfeng Dao Ancestor and them to leave, and he not only harvested the treasure of the Golden Branch Void Fruit, but also the inheritance of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor to the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor, including the Yuan Dao Quenching Technique.

This is an additional reward requested by Ye Tian, and for Qingfeng Dao Ancestor and them, this is naturally nothing, even if it is given to Ye Tian, there is no loss to them.

So, they directly gave Ye Tian this inheritance.

"When the cultivation is promoted to the peak of the sixfold primordial ancestor, then you will definitely comprehend the Yuan Dao, and then you can use the Yuan Dao refining technique to refine the body and step into the half-step sevenfold primordial ancestor realm!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

......

The boundary of the primeval plains, the Holy Gate of the Void Fang.

After Ye Tian returned here, he began to retreat and cultivate.

As for Han Xuan, she was also brought back.

After all, in this life, Han Xuan belonged to the creatures of the primeval primordial realm, so it was naturally not suitable to stay in the Tongtian Primordial realm all the time, even if there were more cultivation resources in the Tongtian Primordial Realm, but for Han Xuan, who was a half-step fivefold primordial ancestor, there was no difference.

Inside the dojo.

Ye Tian took out the Golden Branch Void Fruit, devoured it in one bite, and then began to comprehend the prototype of the Yuan Dao.

Rumble!!!!

Countless realizations poured in, and Ye Tian's Endless Yuan Dao prototype was rising at a very terrifying speed.

"This works ......"

Ye Tian was shocked.

It is worthy of the golden branch void fruit, and it is too helpful to comprehend the prototype of the Endless Yuan Dao!

Time flies, and millions of years of the original domain have passed unconsciously.

And over the years, Ye Tian has been refining the Golden Branch Void Fruit, and using the effect of the Golden Branch Void Fruit, Ye Tian directly raised the Endless Yuan Dao prototype to the peak realm, that is, almost 100% of the level.

He only had one last step left to comprehend the true Endless Yuan Dao.

"The effect of the Golden Branch Void Fruit is very good, but unfortunately I have exhausted my energy, but I am a little short of comprehending the true Endless Yuan Dao, at most ten million Origin Domain Eras, I can comprehend the true Endless Yuan Dao!"

Ye Tian was full of confidence in himself, so he continued to retreat, striving to comprehend the Endless Yuan Dao in one breath.

In the blink of an eye, another sixteen million years of the Origin Era had passed.

Airplanes!!!

An unimaginable terrifying fluctuation permeated from Ye Tian's body, and the Extreme Dao rules in the void were directly shattered, and they couldn't resist this force on Ye Tian's body at all.

This is the power that belongs to the Yuan Dao.

"The Ninefold Yuan Dao - the Endless Yuan Dao, I have finally comprehended it, it's too difficult!"

Ye Tian muttered.

This is him, and other Dao Ancestors who have comprehended the three hundred and sixty-five extreme extreme paths have not comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao so easily!

After comprehending the Ninefold Yuan Dao, Ye Tian's strength skyrocketed.

Next, he only needed to raise his cultivation to the sixth-fold peak Primordial Ancestor, and then he could go to the half-step Sevenfold Primordial Ancestor.

However, the cultivation is not in a hurry, although some of the resources in the current major regional boundaries are useful to him, but the effect is very average, if you want to be promoted to the peak of the Sixfold Ancestor, without a large number of years, it cannot be done.

this day.

Ye Tian participated in some Dao Ancestor Dao Discussion Meetings, and those who were qualified to participate in this meeting were all half-step Sevenfold Ancestors, and he was also qualified.

At the discussion meeting, one Taoist ancestor exchanged Taoism, and as the years passed, each of them had some gains.

Of course, if you have any doubts, you can also say them, and if other Dao Ancestors know, they will also answer them one by one.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian asked, "Dao Ancestors, among the primordial antiquities, are there any treasures that can be killed and can be obtained to greatly improve cultivation?"

At this time, Xuanqing Dao Ancestor said: "This kind of treasure really exists, but I suggest that Endless Dao Ancestor don't fight this idea, it's too dangerous!"
